user.title: Add E-bike Tracker
user.description: Configure one e-bike. The energy entity must be a cumulative kWh meter.

data_description.energy_entity_id: A Home Assistant sensor with a cumulative kWh value, for example from a smart plug.
data_description.power_entity_id: Optional power sensor in watts used to detect charging.
data_description.energy_price: Energy price in PLN per kWh.

init.title: E-bike Tracker options
init.description: Update pricing, source entities, charging detection and battery details.

data_description.energy_price: Energy price in PLN per kWh.
data_description.energy_entity_id: A Home Assistant sensor with a cumulative kWh value.
data_description.charging_power_threshold: Power level in W at or above which the bike is considered charging.

odometer_decrease.message: The new mileage is lower than the current mileage. Use the correction action and confirm the change.

administrator_required.message: Only Home Assistant administrators can correct mileage backwards.

entry_not_found.message: The selected E-bike Tracker entry was not found.

correct_odometer.name: Correct odometer
correct_odometer.description: Correct the e-bike mileage backwards after administrator confirmation.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: The E-bike Tracker config entry to correct.

mileage.name: Mileage
mileage.description: The corrected total mileage in kilometers.

confirm.name: Confirm
confirm.description: Must be enabled to confirm the backward correction.
